_comment: Local preset selection. Copy this file to .harness.local.json (gitignored) and edit. The framework reads .harness.local.json on each commit/push hook to decide which preset's rules to apply.
_preset_options: generic         — default, Conventional Commits, no branch restrictions
example-company — public demo (TICKET-ID prefix + protected branches)
<your-name>     — copy presets/example-company/ to start your own
_author_prefix_doc: Optional. If set, branch-policy-guard treats branches starting with `<author_prefix>-` as personal/dev branches exempt from protected_branches. Leave empty to disable.
